description: Values returned by Rapid.CDN KeDiFa instanciation

slave-kedifa-information.description: JSON mapping each slave reference to its KeDiFa access information.

caucase-url.description: URL to caucase used by KeDiFa.

master-key-generate-auth-url.description: URL to GET once auth for master-key-upload-url

master-key-upload-url.description: URL to PUT PEM bundle of main certificate and key

master-key-download-url.description: URL to GET the PEM bundle of main certificate and key

kedifa-csr-url.description: URL on which KeDiFa publishes its CSR sent to caucase.

csr-certificate.description: Certificate used to serve data on kedifa-csr-url.
